title: test

steps.text: mettre outils sur le plan de travail

genText:
I. preparation tools  
1. Place tools on the workbench (see photo)  

II. Assembly process  
1. Gather all necessary materials and components.  
2. Verify that all tools are functioning and in good condition.  
3. Begin assembly according to the provided schematic diagram.  
4. Ensure that all parts are aligned correctly before securing.  
5. Tighten all fasteners to the specified torque settings.  

III. Quality control  
1. Inspect assembled product for any defects or irregularities.  
2. Conduct functionality tests as per company standards.  
3. Document any findings and report to the supervisor.
